stories.title: Follow live: Lakers in control as Rockets look to ...
stories.summary: Live coverage of the Los Angeles Lakers vs. Houston Rockets NBA game on ESPN, including live score, highlights and updated stats.

stories.title: Pistons roar back to stun ice-cold Magic, force G7...
stories.summary: The top-seeded Detroit Pistons pulled off an incredible rally, erasing a 24-point deficit and beating the Orlando Magic 93-79 to force a Game 7 in their Eastern Conference first-round series.

stories.title: Barrett saves Raptors' season with dramatic 3
stories.summary: RJ Barrett got a friendly bounce to hit the winning 3-pointer with 1.2 seconds left in overtime, helping the Raptors force Game 7 with a 112-110 win over the Cavs on Friday night.

stories.title: Sabres win playoff series for 1st time since 2007
stories.summary: The Sabres defeated the Bruins 4-1 on Friday night in Game 6 to advance to the second round of the NHL playoffs for the first time since 2007.

stories.title: Sources: Colts declining Richardson's '27 option
stories.summary: The Colts are declining to exercise QB Anthony Richardson's fifth-year option for 2027, a source told ESPN, meaning Richardson will hit unrestricted free agency after the 2026 season.
